_doc: Zone name aliases — merges near-duplicate wiki entries into one canonical record.
Each key is the CANONICAL zone name as it should appear in the cleaned
output. Each value is an array of duplicate names that exist in the
source data and should be merged INTO the canonical (their records are
dropped, their names appended to the canonical's aliases list).
When ACT logs an encounter with the alias name, the website can look it
up against the aliases list and resolve to the canonical zone record.
Canonical-choice convention: prefer the form WITHOUT a leading 'The'.
Keys starting with '_' (like this one) are ignored by the loader.
